scripts.install:all: cd account-service && yarn install && cd ../file-service && yarn install && cd ../geolocalisation-service && yarn install && cd ../user-service && yarn install && cd ../ws-service && yarn install
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue" -n "user,ws,account,file,geoloc" "cd user-service && yarn dev" "cd ws-service && yarn dev" "cd account-service && yarn dev" "cd file-service && yarn dev" "cd geolocalisation-service && yarn dev"
scripts.test:all: cd account-service && yarn test && cd ../file-service && yarn test && cd ../geolocalisation-service && yarn test && cd ../user-service && yarn test && cd ../ws-service && yarn test
